description: Prod dashboard for alerting, open a PR for updating these dashboards and alerts.

options.content:
# Dashboard Legend

For dashboard best practices, see [Grafana documentation](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/visualizations/dashboards/build-dashboards/best-practices/)

## Color Meanings

- 🟢 **Green**: Healthy / Normal operation
- 🟡 **Yellow**: Warning / Attention needed  
- 🔴 **Red**: Critical / Action required

Colors apply to all metrics based on their specific thresholds.

panels.description: 30-day SLO tracking for multichain sign requests completed in time
panels.title: In-time Requests SLI (commit/version/chain)

panels.description: 30-day SLO tracking for multichain sign requests completed in time

targets.expr: (sum(increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[30d])) / (sum(increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[30d])) + (sum(increase(multichain_sign_request_delayed{environment=~"$environment"}[30d])) or vector(0)))) * 100

panels.title: In-time Requests SLI

panels.description: Rate of sign requests at awaiting_generation step by chain
panels.title: Request rate

panels.description: Maximum CPU usage across all nodes
panels.title: Max CPU Usage

panels.description: Minimum available memory across all nodes
panels.title: Min Available RAM

panels.description: Minimum available disk space across all nodes
panels.title: Min Available Disk

panels.description: 95th percentile latency for sign requests by chain
panels.title: Request Latency P95

panels.description: Percentage of sign requests completed on time (not delayed). Tracks 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day windows plus current rate.

targets.expr: (sum by(chain) (rate(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[$__rate_interval])) / (sum by(chain) (rate(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[$__rate_interval])) + (sum by(chain) (rate(multichain_sign_request_delayed{environment=~"$environment"}[$__rate_interval])) or (0 * sum by(chain) (rate(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[$__rate_interval])))))) * 100

(sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[1h])) / (sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[1h])) + (sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_delayed{environment=~"$environment"}[1h])) or (0 * sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[1h])))))) * 100

(sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[24h])) / (sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[24h])) + (sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_delayed{environment=~"$environment"}[24h])) or (0 * sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[24h])))))) * 100

(sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[7d])) / (sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[7d])) + (sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_delayed{environment=~"$environment"}[7d])) or (0 * sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[7d])))))) * 100

(sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[30d])) / (sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[30d])) + (sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_delayed{environment=~"$environment"}[30d])) or (0 * sum by(chain) (increase(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_count{environment=~"$environment", step="total", status="in_time"}[30d])))))) * 100

panels.title: In-time Requests SLI Trend

panels.description: Number of pending backlog requests by chain and node account
panels.title: Backlog Size

panels.description: P95 latency breakdown for Solana sign requests by processing step: indexing (network propagation + polling), awaiting generation (queue time), generating (signature creation), and responding (delivery). Stacked bars show cumulative time spent in each stage. The total line shows end-to-end latency.
panels.title: Solana Sign Request Latency Breakdown P95

panels.description: P95 latency breakdown for Ethereum sign requests by processing step: indexing (network propagation + polling), awaiting generation (queue time), generating (signature creation), and responding (delivery). Stacked bars show cumulative time spent in each stage. The total line shows end-to-end latency.
panels.title: Ethereum Sign Request Latency Breakdown P95

panels.description: P95 latency breakdown for Hydration sign requests by processing step: indexing (network propagation + polling), awaiting generation (queue time), generating (signature creation), and responding (delivery). Stacked bars show cumulative time spent in each stage. The total line shows end-to-end latency.
panels.title: Hydration Sign Request Latency Breakdown P95

panels.description: Shows spikes (value=1) when nodes restart. Restart = process uptime < 5 minutes. No data = no recent restarts.
panels.title: Node restarts

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (node_account_id, chain, le) (rate(multichain_sign_request_latency_sec_bucket{node_account_id=~"$node_account_id", step="indexing"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.description: Cumulative count of indexing step sign requests grouped by chain and node
panels.title: Requests (indexing step)

panels.description: Cumulative count of awaiting_generation step sign requests grouped by chain and node
panels.title: Requests (awaiting_generation step)

panels.description:
Success rate = success / (success + failures).

`rate(failures) or rate(success) * 0` — when the failures metric has no data (i.e. zero failures have ever occurred), we fall back to `rate(success) * 0` which produces a zero-valued series with the correct `node_account_id` labels, allowing the binary operation to resolve correctly and the panel to show 100%.
panels.title: Signature Generator Success Rate

panels.description: This calculation may be a bit inaccurate due to how the calculation for CPU is done, but is okay for a quick reference. This compares the last value and current value. Check GCP and direct host metrics for 100% accurate CPU percentage.
panels.title: CPU

title: Chain Signatures (Staging)
